heading: Step 2: Apply operators to define your search criteria.
body:
To define your search criteria, you must apply one or more [operators](fts-operators) or [collectors](fts-collectors)
to your [$search](pipe.$search) or [$searchMeta](pipe.$searchMeta) pipeline stage.

MongoDB Search operators allow you to locate and retrieve relevant data from your cluster according to content, format, or data tyoe.
To learn which operators support searches for each [supported](bson-data-types), see the table in the [operators](fts-operators) reference section.
You must specify one or more indexed search fields in the operator's [query path](ref-path) parameter:

$search

$searchMeta

> **Tip:** You can combine multiple operators into one operation using the [compound](compound-ref) operator.
> You can also use the [compound](compound-ref) operator's *filter* clause to filter for query output that matches a given clause.
